summary: Completed iteration 12 testing for SR Rénovation quote app. All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend UI tests confirmed: 1) Public quote page responsive scaling works on mobile/tablet/desktop, 2) PIN auth works (0330), 3) SendQuoteModal greeting format is 'Bonjour, Monsieur {LastName}', 4) All backend email template changes verified via code inspection.

issues: Greeting shows 'Bonjour, Monsieur ,' with trailing comma when client has only first name (e.g., 'Meuret Steve' -> lastName='Steve' but shows empty). This is because getDefaultBody extracts lastName from end of name but if name structure differs, may show empty.

frontend_ui_tests.public_quote_page_mobile_375px: PASS - Page loads and scales correctly
frontend_ui_tests.send_quote_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens on Envoyer button click

features_verified: ✓ Public quote page responsive CSS transform scaling (fits 794px PDF to viewport)
✓ Backend SignQuote model accepts pdf_base64 and pdf_filename fields
✓ Backend sign endpoint sends admin notification email with signed PDF attached
✓ Backend sign endpoint sends client confirmation email with RIB (IBAN FR76 1080 7000 1312 3197 7296 321, BIC CCBPFRPPDJN, Banque Populaire BFC)
✓ Backend quote-sending email has subtitle 'Nettoyage, toiture, façade, terrasse' (HTML entities)
✓ Backend quote-sending email CTA button color is #F9A825 (lighter orange)
✓ Backend quote-sending email footer has unicode icons (☎ phone, ✉ email, 🏠 house, 🌐 globe)
✓ Backend email uses Georgia serif font for title
✓ Backend email uses proper HTML entities for accents (é=é, è=è, ç=ç)
✓ Frontend SendQuoteModal default greeting is 'Bonjour, Monsieur {LastName}'
✓ Frontend PDFDocument shows client signature in signature box when document.signature_data exists
✓ Frontend Public page has 'Télécharger le devis signé' button (data-testid='download-signed-pdf-btn')
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Sign endpoint (lines 741-898) correctly handles pdf_base64/pdf_filename, sends admin email with PDF, sends client confirmation with RIB
✓ Quote email template (lines 927-996) has updated subtitle, CTA button #F9A825, Georgia font, unicode footer icons
✓ PublicQuotePage.jsx has CSS transform scaling for responsive display
✓ PDFPreview.js (lines 378-386) conditionally renders client signature when document.signature_data exists
✓ SendQuoteModal.jsx extracts lastName from client name for 'Bonjour, Monsieur {LastName}' greeting
seed_data_creation: Used existing quotes in system (4 quotes visible on dashboard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features complete: 1) Public page responsive scaling via CSS transform, 2) Sign endpoint sends emails with PDF to admin and client (client gets RIB), 3) Email template updates (subtitle, CTA #F9A825, unicode footer, Georgia font), 4) SendQuoteModal greeting 'Bonjour, Monsieur {LastName}', 5) PDFDocument shows signature when present, 6) Download signed PDF button. PIN auth works with 0330.
